## Summary

<!-- 1-3 bullets: what this PR changes and why. Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #123). -->

-

## Type of change

<!-- Match the type of your Conventional Commit(s). Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] `feat` - New feature
- [ ] `fix` - Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` - Documentation only
- [ ] `style` - Formatting, no code change
- [ ] `refactor` - Code change, no feature/fix
- [ ] `perf` - Performance improvement
- [ ] `test` - Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `build` / `ci` - Build system or CI changes
- [ ] `chore` - Other changes
- [ ] Breaking change (adds `!` or `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer)

## How tested

<!-- Describe how you verified the change: commands run, browsers, manual steps. -->

-

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`type(scope): description`)
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`pnpm test:unit --run`)
- [ ] E2E tests pass where relevant (`pnpm test:e2e`)
- [ ] Type check passes (`pnpm check`)
- [ ] Lint and formatting pass (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Docs updated where needed (README, CHANGELOG, `CLAUDE.md`)
- [ ] No third-party/unlicensed assets added to the repo
